chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No. D–3260 of 2025 ___________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ______________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 11.09-2025 Mr. Kailash Ashok Vashwani, Addl. P.G, Sindh. ------------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. Furthermore, it transpires that certain amendments have been made in the Sindh Control of Narcotics Substances Act 2024, providing for Bail Application to be entertained by the fora below. As such, the instant Petition stands dismissed, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
